parameters.description: Number of the requested devices page. Use this parameter to iterate through all devices on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response body (pageAmount).
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Parameter for specifying the queried items per page.
parameters.name: pageSize

parameters.description: Sort values based on keys that are listed as a comma seperated list, prepend "-" for descending order.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description:
Filter parameter in {filter}:{value} format. Comma separated list of filtering criteria out of the following fields:
  • iccid

Example: "iccid:8988280666000000000"
parameters.name: q
